hero.title: Brahmi Script in Jain Philosophy
hero.subtitle: Eternal Jain knowledge preserved through the Brahmi Script.
hero.description: This course presents the Brahmi Script as the medium through which Jain philosophy, values, and spiritual principles have been preserved from generation to generation.

value.title: Script, Not Language.
value.description: In the Jain tradition, Brahmi is understood as a script, not a spoken language. It is the precise medium for preserving Jain philosophical principles, scriptures, and teachings in written form.

steps.title: Step 1: Philosophy & Context
steps.description: Introduction to Jain philosophy and the role of Brahmi Script. Understanding concepts like Dharma, Ahimsa, and Moksha.

steps.title: Step 2: Vowels & Consonants
steps.description: Recognition, practice, and testing of vowels and consonants. Their application in Jain words and sacred expressions.

steps.title: Step 3: The Art of Matras
steps.description: Proper usage and combination of matras. Reading and writing Jain philosophical words with clarity.

footer.title: Brahmi Script
footer.description: Preserving ancient wisdom through modern technology.
footer.copyright: © {{year}} Brahmi Script Learning Platform. All rights reserved.

cta.title: Begin Your Journey
cta.description: Connect with the ancient script of Jain knowledge. Every letter is a step towards tradition.

trust.title: Foundation of Trust
trust.description: Our methodology is based on ancient principles of Jain tradition and classical scholarship

items.title: Sacred Origin
items.description: Created by Lord Rishabhadev and given to his daughter Brahmi. The original script of Jain scriptures.

items.title: Disciplined Study
items.description: Step-by-step, patient methodology. Aligned with Jain teaching tradition and spiritual learning.

items.title: Knowledge Preservation
items.description: Designed to safeguard Jain philosophical knowledge in its original script and structure.
